general.title: Load CSV Files [SPAC] [DMAP]
general.instructions: Load CSV files from NIDAP dataset and combine them into a single pandas dataframe for downstream processing. Please refer to DUET Documentation and GitHub Documentation for further information.

parameters.name: CSV Files Pattern
parameters.description: Glob pattern to match CSV data files (e.g., 'data/*.csv' or specific filenames comma-separated). These are the CSV files to be combined.

parameters.name: Configuration File
parameters.description: Path or filename of the CSV configuration file specifying which files to include and labels to add. Should contain 'config' in the filename.

parameters.name: String Columns
parameters.description: List specific columns to be read as string/text.
